LobbyBG_78_Paid_Desc.korean: 당신의 밤을 아름답게 가꾸기 위해, 이터니티가 준비했습니다. 온몸 가득히 꽃잎을 안은 당신은 지금, 어떤 생각을 하고 있나요?

LobbyBG_79_Paid_Desc.english: A feast of Eurobeat blasting as if the speakers are about to break! My goodness, you prepared a song to play for a Gyaru Shiden too? You're such a cool boyfriend!
LobbyBG_79_Paid_Desc.korean: 스피커가 부서질 듯 울리는 유로비트의 향연! 세상에, 당신도 갸루 시덴에게 들려줄 노래를 준비했다고요? 정말 멋진 남친이시네요!

LobbyBG_80_Paid_Desc.english: A feast of Eurobeat blasting as if the speakers are about to break! My goodness, you prepared a song to play for a Gyaru Shiden too? You're such a cool boyfriend!
LobbyBG_80_Paid_Desc.korean: 스피커가 부서질 듯 울리는 유로비트의 향연! 세상에, 당신도 갸루 시덴에게 들려줄 노래를 준비했다고요? 정말 멋진 남친이시네요!

PrePackDesc_Shop_Package_CharTicket_Char.english: This package contains the Combatant Sawame of Silent Tears, the Sawame of Silent Tears Black Sailor Uniform, 1 Commander's Journal, and 1 Oath Ring.
PrePackDesc_Shop_Package_CharTicket_Char.korean: 전투원 암루의 사와메와 암루의 사와메 용 흑세라복, 사령관의 일지 1개, 서약 반지 1개가 들어있는 패키지입니다.

PrePackName_Shop_Package_CharTicket_Char.english: Early Access Package [Sawame of Silent Tears]

RegPackDesc_Shop_Package_Reg_CharTicket_.english: This package contains Combatant Sawame of Silent Tears, one Commander's Journal, and one Oath Ring.
RegPackDesc_Shop_Package_Reg_CharTicket_.korean: 전투원 암루의 사와메와 사령관의 일지 1개, 서약 반지 1개가 들어있는 패키지입니다.

SkillDescSimple_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N.english: Designated range enhancement effect / Remove harmful effects / AP reduction.
SkillDescSimple_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N.korean: 지정 범위 강화 효과 / 해로운 효과 해제 / AP 감소.

SkillDescSimple_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N.english: Target range {0} ignores protection damage / disables protection. Damage proportional to the target's current HP. Damage to the target over time.
SkillDescSimple_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N.korean: 지정 범위 {0} 보호 무시 피해 / 보호 무시 비활성화. 적중 대상 자신 현재 HP 비례 피해. 자신 지속 물리 피해.

SkillDescSimple_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N.english: When an ally is hit, remove enemy attack power buff / reduce skill power.
SkillDescSimple_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N.korean: 아군 피격 시, 적 공격력 강화 해제 / 스킬 위력 감소.

SkillDescSimple_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N.english: Designated protection for allies within range. Applies different effects based on role and shares effects with yourself.
SkillDescSimple_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N.korean: 범위 내 아군 지정 보호. 역할군에 따라 다른 효과 적용 및 자신과 효과 공유.

SkillDescSimple_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N.english: At the end of a wave, gain Continue Combat. Enhance <Death Caused by Anger>. When an enemy dies, increase ally AP.
SkillDescSimple_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N.korean: 웨이브 종료 시, 자신 전투 속행 획득. <앙화로 말미암은 죽음> 강화. 적 사망 시, 아군 AP 증가.

SkillDesc_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_1.english: Purifies a designated area through a ritual to cleanse impurity. When using the skill, removes enhancement and harmful effects applied to the target. If the target's HP percentage is higher than yours, only the target's enhancements are removed, and your AP is additionally reduced.
SkillDesc_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_1.korean:
부정을 씻는 의식을 통해 지정 범위를 정화합니다.
스킬 사용 시, 대상에게 적용된 강화 효과와 해로운 효과를 해제합니다.
대상의 HP 비율이 자신보다 높을 경우, 대상의 강화 효과만을 해제하고 추가로 AP가 감소합니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_2.english: Release a vengeful spirit to deal {0} ignore protection damage to a designated area. Disable the target's ignore protection for 2 rounds, regardless of whether it hits. If it hits, deal damage to the target proportional to your current HP. You take physical damage over time at the end of the round in which this effect was triggered.
SkillDesc_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_2.korean:
원혼을 해방하여 지정 범위에 {0} 보호 무시 피해를 줍니다.
적중 여부에 관계 없이, 2라운드 동안 대상의 보호 무시를 비활성화합니다.
적중 시, 대상에게 자신 현재 HP에 비례한 피해를 줍니다. 자신은 효과가 발동한 라운드 종료 시, 지속 물리 피해를 입습니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_3.english: When an ally is hit, remove all enemy attack power buffs and reduce skill power for 2 rounds. When you are hit, the effect triggers twice. (Maximum 4 stacks) Targets affected by the above effect are treated as having met the HP condition for <Ritual of impurity purification>.
SkillDesc_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_3.korean:
아군 피격 시, 모든 적의 공격력 강화 효과를 해제하고 2라운드 동안 스킬 위력을 감소시킵니다. 자신 피격 시에는 효과가 두 번 발동합니다. (최대 4중첩)
상기 효과가 적용된 대상은 <부정 정화의 의식>의 HP 조건을 충족한 것으로 취급합니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_4.english: At the start of the round, designate and protect an ally within range, excluding the Protector. At the start of the round, the ally located in the center gains different effects depending on their role. The effect values are amplified based on the number of allies adjacent to the target. - Attacker: Removes harmful effects / Increases accuracy - Protector: Minimizes damage (1 time) / Reduces damage taken - Supporter: Activates scouting / Increases action points. If you are within range at the start of the round, you gain the same effects as the ally in the center, and if you are an Attacker or Supporter, you designate and protect them.
SkillDesc_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_4.korean:
라운드 개시 시, 범위 내 보호기를 제외한 아군을 지정 보호합니다. 
라운드 개시 시, 정중앙에 위치한 아군은 역할군에 따라 각기 다른 효과를 획득합니다. 효과 수치는 대상과 인접한 아군 수에 따라 증폭됩니다.
- 공격기 : 해로운 효과 해제 / 적중 증가
- 보호기 : 피해 최소화(1회) / 받는 피해 감소
- 지원기 : 정찰 활성화 / 행동력 증가
라운드 개시 시 자신이 범위 내에 있을 경우, 정중앙에 위치한 아군과 동일한 효과를 획득하고 공격기 / 지원기일 경우 지정 보호합니다.

SkillDesc_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_5.english: At the end of a wave, you gain Combat Continuation. (Cannot stack) While the above Combat Continuation effect is active, <Death Caused by Anger> deals additional damage proportional to the target's maximum HP to enemies with 70% or more HP. Upon enemy death, your AP and the AP of allies you are designating to protect increase.
SkillDesc_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_5.korean:
웨이브 종료 시, 자신은 전투 속행을 획득합니다. (중첩 불가)
상기 전투 속행 효과가 유지되는 동안, <앙화로 말미암은 죽음>은 HP 70% 이상인 적에 대해 추가로 대상 최대 HP에 비례한 피해를 줍니다.
적 사망 시, 자신과 자신이 지정 보호 중인 아군의 AP가 증가합니다.

SkillName_Skill_PECS_AnruiSawame_N_4.english: A place where the gods dwell

SkinDesc_Skin_3P_Eternity_5.english: Ordinary flowers lose their vitality and wither quickly when picked, but the flower called Eternity is a beautiful living flower that never wilts. She says she is happy to spend every moment of her life with her beloved Master. Bury your face in her bouquet, which blooms only through your affection, and let her experience the process of the bud fully opening with her whole body.
SkinDesc_Skin_3P_Eternity_5.korean: 평범한 꽃은 꺾이면 생기를 잃고 금방 시들어버리지만, 이터니티라는 꽃은 영원히 시들지 않는 아름다운 생화(生花) 그 자체로군요. 생애 매 순간이 사랑하는 주인님과 함께할 수 있어 행복하다는 그녀. 당신의 애정으로만 피어나는 그녀의 꽃다발에 얼굴을 파묻고, 꽃봉오리가 만개하는 과정을 온몸으로 경험시켜 주세요. ​

SkinDesc_Skin_BR_Vargr_5.english: She is a mature woman who always silently bears the weight of leadership. However, even this perfect woman has a fatal weakness…!? Just for today, let’s lay down all our worries and anxieties and be swept along by the refreshing currents. Of course, let’s promise never to let go of our tightly clasped hands. Now, under the pouring sunlight, let’s create colorful memories with this innocent and pure girl!
SkinDesc_Skin_BR_Vargr_5.korean: 언제나 리더의 무게를 묵묵히 견뎌 내는 의젓한 그녀. 하지만 완벽한 그녀에게도 치명적인 약점은 존재했으니…!? 오늘만큼은 근심, 걱정을 모두 내려놓고 시원한 물살에 이리저리 휩쓸려 보기로 해요. 물론, 꼭 맞잡은 두 손은 절대로 놓지 말기로 약속하고요. 자, 쏟아지는 햇살 아래 순진무구하고 천진난만한 그녀와 다채로운 추억을! ​

SkinDesc_Skin_DS_KunoichiShiden_2.english: They say a late bloom is the most dangerous, and indeed, she has finally taken on the challenge of the cute Gyaru style she has longed for for 800 years. Empowered by your full support and affection, she has finally mustered the courage to attempt an image transformation. Of course, Nadeshiko is lovely and courageous no matter what she looks like, but perhaps because she is wearing an outfit she absolutely loves today, she is overflowing with a charm rarely seen in her usual self. As a Kunoichi, the reward for never neglecting her Gyaru training under Boryeon's guidance is finally shining through!
SkinDesc_Skin_DS_KunoichiShiden_2.korean:
늦바람이 무섭다더니, 마침내 800년 동안 그토록 동경해 온 귀여운 갸루 스타일에 도전하게 되었군요. ​
그녀는 당신의 전폭적인 지지와 애정에 힘입어, 드디어 용기를 내서 이미지 변신을 시도했습니다. 물론 어떤 모습이든지 사랑스럽고 용맹한 나데시코이지만, 오늘은 마음에 쏙 드는 옷을 입은 덕분인지 평소에는 보기 드물었던 애교까지 뚝뚝 흘러넘칩니다. ​
쿠노이치로서, 그동안 보련의 주도 아래에서 갸루 수련을 게을리하지 않았던 보람이 이제야 빛을 발하는군요!

SkinDesc_Skin_PECS_AnruiSawame_1.english: A school from before the apocalypse, preserved excessively neatly and perfectly without a single crumbling spot. Have you ever heard of the curse of the spider lilies blooming luxuriantly there? Where have all the human corpses disappeared to?
SkinDesc_Skin_PECS_AnruiSawame_1.korean:
어디 하나 무너져 내린 곳 없이, 지나치게 깔끔하고 완벽하게 보전된 멸망 전의 어느 학교. 그곳에서 탐스럽게 피어나는 피안화의 저주에 대해 들어본 적 있나요? ​
인간님들의 시체는 모두 어디로 사라진 걸까요?​

SkinName_Skin_PECS_AnruiSawame_1.english: Black Sailor Uniform (Sawame of Silent Tears)

SkinPackDesc_Skin_3P_Eternity_5.english: This is a package containing an Eternity flower dress, one handmade cake, two chocolates, and three synthetic lollipops.
SkinPackDesc_Skin_3P_Eternity_5.korean: 이터니티 용 플라워 드레스와 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 패키지입니다.

SkinPackDesc_Skin_BR_Vargr_5.english: This is a package containing a swimsuit for Vargr, one handmade cake, two chocolates, and three synthetic lollipops.
SkinPackDesc_Skin_BR_Vargr_5.korean: 바르그 용 수영복과 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 패키지입니다.

SkinPackDesc_Skin_DS_KunoichiShiden_2.english: This is a package containing a White Tiger Onegyaru for Shiden, one handmade cake, two chocolates, and three synthetic lollipops.
SkinPackDesc_Skin_DS_KunoichiShiden_2.korean: 쿠노이치 시덴 용 화이트 타이거 오네갸루와 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 패키지입니다.

SkinPackDesc_Skin_DS_KunoichiShiden_3.english: This is a package containing a Shiden Black Tiger Onegyaru, one handmade cake, two chocolates, and three synthetic lollipops.
SkinPackDesc_Skin_DS_KunoichiShiden_3.korean: 쿠노이치 시덴 용 블랙 타이거 오네갸루와 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 패키지입니다.

SkinPackDesc_Skin_DS_KunoichiShiden_set.english: This is a package containing the White Tiger Onegyaru and Black Tiger Onegyaru for the Shiden.
SkinPackDesc_Skin_DS_KunoichiShiden_set.korean: 쿠노이치 시덴 용 화이트 타이거 오네갸루와 블랙 타이거 오네갸루가 들어있는 패키지입니다.

SkinPackDesc_Skin_PECS_AnruiSawame_1.english: This is a package containing Sawame of Silent Tears Black Sailor Uniform, 1 handmade cake, 2 chocolates, and 3 synthetic lollipops.
SkinPackDesc_Skin_PECS_AnruiSawame_1.korean: 암루의 사와메 용 흑세라복과 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 패키지입니다.

SkinPackName_Skin_3P_Eternity_5.english: Blooming LOVE : Fresh Flower Bouquet Dress

SkinPackName_Skin_BR_Vargr_5.korean: 물 개? 늑! 대 : 컬러풀 스윔 수트

SkinPackName_Skin_DS_KunoichiShiden_2.english: Teach Me! Everything About Gyaru: Shirogyaru

SkinPackName_Skin_DS_KunoichiShiden_3.english: Teach Me! Everything About Gyaru: Kurogyaru

SkinPackName_Skin_PECS_AnruiSawame_1.english: The School Where Red Spider Lilies Bloom and Wither: Black Sailor Uniform

Vargr1ED_1.english: Hey. What's wrong with you, constantly staring at the sea? Aren't you going to work?
Vargr1ED_1.korean: 야. 너 뭔데 자꾸 바다만 바라보냐? 일 안 해?

Vargr1ED_10.english: Hehe... If the hot pack sees this, it won't be able to stand it and will go absolutely crazy, right?
Vargr1ED_10.korean: 히힛… 핫팩이 보면 못 참아서 아주 안달 날 걸?

Vargr1ED_11.english: You can't even regulate your body temperature properly, so you'll probably whine and collapse from exhaustion, you idiot. You make a fuss at the slightest cold, yet you think you'll have a great time in the pool?
Vargr1ED_11.korean:
체온 조절도 제대로 못 해서 낑낑거리다 탈진하겠지, 븅신아.
좀만 추워도 난리 치는 년이, 풀장에서 잘도 놀겠다.

Vargr1ED_12.english: By the way, when the three of us—me, Hot Pack, and you—went all cute in your swimsuits, saying, "Don't look at me like that~ I'm so shyyy~♥"?
Vargr1ED_12.korean:
그러는 너는 나랑 핫팩이랑 셋이서 아쿠아 랜드 갔을 때, 수영복 입고서는 
'그렇게 보지 마아~ 부끄러워어엉~♥' 하면서 애교부리지 않았었냐?

Vargr1ED_13.english: You guys over there. You wiped the table spotless, right? You're chatting away, aren't you?
Vargr1ED_13.korean: 거기 너희들. 테이블에 먼지 하나 없이 싹싹 닦아놓고 떠드는 중이겠지?

Vargr1ED_14.english: You little brat. I've done enough, so let JangHwa do the rest! Ugh, seriously. I'm so bored, I need to escape quickly!
Vargr1ED_14.korean: 똥강아지. 난 할 만큼 했으니까, 나머지는 장화한테 시켜! 아~ 진짜. 지겨워서 얼른 탈출해야지!

Vargr1ED_15.english: The escape you're talking about won't work if it's within a month. That's because I took my vacation first.
Vargr1ED_15.korean: 네가 말하는 탈출이 한 달 안이라면 안 된다. 내가 먼저 휴가를 냈기 때문이지.

Vargr1ED_16.english: What? Hey! What are we supposed to do about the branch if you drop out?!
Vargr1ED_16.korean: 뭐? 야! 너 빠지면 분점은 어쩌라고?!

Vargr1ED_17.english: Haven't the Horizon members and I been in charge of managing the branch whenever you guys went on vacation?
Vargr1ED_17.korean: 그간 너희들이 휴가를 쓰며 놀러 갈 때마다 분점 관리는 나와 호라이즌 대원들이 도맡아 하지 않았나.

Vargr1ED_18.english: You guys didn't do all of this by yourselves! I even attached the battery for you!
Vargr1ED_18.korean: 너희들끼리만 다 한 거 아니잖아, 내가 배터리도 붙여 줬잖아!

Vargr1ED_19.english: I'm sorry to say this to Fafnir, but... it wasn't any help at all. The Horizon crew members struggled quite a bit.
Vargr1ED_19.korean:
파프니르한테는 미안한 말이지만… 전혀 도움이 되질 않았다.
호라이즌 대원들이 상당히 버거워했었지.

Vargr1ED_2.english: Ha, stop nagging. It's not even a busy time right now.
Vargr1ED_2.korean: 하, 잔소리는. 지금 바쁜 시간대도 아니잖아.

Vargr1ED_20.english: After working like that for a few days, the Sirene store manager told me to take a break.
Vargr1ED_20.korean: 그렇게 며칠을 일했더니, 세이렌 점장이 내게 좀 쉬라고 하더군.

Vargr1ED_21.english: This vacation is going to be a bit long, so please keep a close eye on the Cafe Horizon branch during this time.
Vargr1ED_21.korean: 이번 휴가는 좀 길어질 테니, 그동안 카페 호라이즌 분점을 잘 지키고 있도록.

Vargr1ED_22.english: Oh my goodness. You little rascal, at first you were so excited that the commander was visiting, sweeping and wiping away…
Vargr1ED_22.korean: 얼씨구. 똥개, 너 처음에는 사령관이 방문한다고 신나서 쓸고 닦고 하더니만…

Vargr1ED_23.english: Looks like it's getting hard for you to make such a fuss every day now, too?
Vargr1ED_23.korean: 너도 이제 매일 그 난리 치긴 힘드나 봐?

Vargr1ED_24.english: The Commander probably won't be coming here for the time being.
Vargr1ED_24.korean: 아마 당분간은 사령관님께서 여기에 오실 일은 없을 거예요.

Vargr1ED_25.english: What?! Why? Why isn't the hot pack coming here?
Vargr1ED_25.korean: 뭐?! 왜? 왜 핫팩이 여길 안 오는데?

Vargr1ED_26.english: Haven't you heard the news yet? The Commander said he is going to inspect Aqua Land in preparation for the summer.
Vargr1ED_26.korean: 아직 소식 못 들으셨어요? 사령관님께서는 여름을 대비해서 아쿠아 랜드로 시찰 가신다고 하셨어요.

Vargr1ED_27.english: Remember when the Steel Line members swarmed Aqua Land in a group before... and the facility was paralyzed?
Vargr1ED_27.korean: 전에 스틸라인 대원분들이 아쿠아 랜드에 단체로 몰려가셔서… 시설이 마비됐었잖아요.

Vargr1ED_28.english: He said that from then on, they would prepare in advance so that operations would proceed without problems, no matter how many people there were.
Vargr1ED_28.korean: 그 뒤로는 아무리 인원이 많아도 문제없이 운영되도록 미리 대비한다고 하셨어요.

Vargr1ED_29.english: Oh, really? But how did you know that?
Vargr1ED_29.korean: 아, 그래? 그런데 넌 그걸 어떻게 안 거야?

Vargr1ED_3.english: If you're not busy, find something else to do! Wipe the table with a dishcloth, or do the dishes!
Vargr1ED_3.korean:
안 바쁘면 다른 일을 찾아서 하란 말이야!
행주로 테이블을 닦든가, 아니면 설거지를 하든가!

Vargr1ED_30.english: Well, when I was in bed with the Commander… Hah!
Vargr1ED_30.korean: 그야, 사령관님이랑 같이 침대에 있었을 때… 핫!

Vargr1ED_31.english: Ahem, hmm! Ah, no... Anyway, Commander, you are staying in the Svalbard Islands for the time being, right?
Vargr1ED_31.korean: 으흠, 흐음! 아, 아니… 하여튼 당분간 사령관님께서는 스발바르 제도에 머무르신다는 거죠.

Vargr1ED_33.english: If the manager says so, the Master is going to Aqua Land himself, right...?
Vargr1ED_33.korean: 점장의 말대로라면, 주인님께서 직접 아쿠아 랜드에 가시는 거겠지…?

Vargr1ED_34.english: Yes. Oh, Vargr! While you're at it, why don't you go to Aqua Land during your vacation to see the Commander as well?
Vargr1ED_34.korean: 네. 앗, 바르그 씨! 이참에 사령관님도 뵐 겸, 휴가 때 아쿠아 랜드에 가는 건 어떠세요?

Vargr1ED_36.english: Pfft! A beer bottle that can't even float is going to Aqua Land?
Vargr1ED_36.korean: 푸흡! 물에 뜨지도 못하는 맥주병이 아쿠아 랜드에 간다고?

Vargr1ED_37.english: Haa... Back during the Iron Workshop Operation, we were the only ones who suffered like dogs because we couldn't swim.
Vargr1ED_37.korean: 하아… 전에 철의 공방 작전 때도 수영 못해서 우리만 개같이 고생했었지.

Vargr1ED_38.english: Do you think I'm doing this because I don't want to swim…?! I'm telling you, I can't float because I'm too heavy!!
Vargr1ED_38.korean:
나, 나라고 수영을 안 하고 싶어서 그러는 줄 아느냐…?!
난 몸이 무거워서 물에 뜨지 않는단 말이다!!

Vargr1ED_39.english: Varr, our captain, said that there is nothing you cannot achieve with effort. If even elephants can swim, isn't there any reason why you can't?
Vargr1ED_39.korean:
바르그 씨, 저희 대장님께서는 노력해서 안 될 건 없다고 하셨어요.
코끼리도 수영하는데, 바르그 씨라고 못 할 이유는 없지 않을까요?

Vargr1ED_4.english: Vargr only orders me around! Am I the only one with hands and feet?
Vargr1ED_4.korean: 바르그가 나한테만 시키잖아! 손발은 나만 있냐?

Vargr1ED_40.english: I, I always sank into the water... I have a constitution that can't swim.
Vargr1ED_40.korean: 나, 난 늘 물속에 가라앉았단 말이다… 수영을 못하는 체질,

Vargr1ED_41.english: Shut up, and while you're at it, go learn how to swim. Do we really have to take you swimming even when we're out on a mission?
Vargr1ED_41.korean: 시끄럽고, 너 이참에 수영이나 좀 배워와라. 임무 나가서까지 우리가 널 데리고 헤엄쳐야 하냐?

Vargr1ED_42.english: That's right. You always say to respect the commander, but how long do you plan to keep getting carried around like a child during every underwater operation?
Vargr1ED_42.korean: 맞아. 입버릇처럼 대장을 존중하라면서, 언제까지 수중 작전 때마다 애처럼 업혀서 다닐 생각이야?

Vargr1ED_44.english: You saw an opening and jumped right on it, didn't you?

Vargr1ED_45.english: What do you expect to do if you glare at me like that? Are you going to cut off our heads like in the old days? Huh?
Vargr1ED_45.korean: 그렇게 노려보면 뭐 어쩔 건데. 옛날처럼 우리 목이라도 자르게? 응?

Vargr1ED_46.english: You idiot, I guess it can't be helped since you're a fool who forgets everything I teach you. But still, as the leader, shouldn't you be able to overcome your shortcomings on your own?
Vargr1ED_46.korean:
바보니르야, 뭘 가르쳐 줘도 맨날 까먹는 바보니까 어쩔 수 없는데.
넌 그래도 명색이 대장이면 자기가 부족한 부분은 스스로 극복해야 하지 않냐?

Vargr1ED_47.english: Ahaha... Um, excuse me. I think you're speaking a bit too harshly...
Vargr1ED_47.korean: 아하하… 저, 저기요. 너무 살벌하게 말씀하시는 거 같은데…

Vargr1ED_49.english: Alright. Since you guys are saying it so strongly, I can't just ignore it. I will learn to swim.
Vargr1ED_49.korean: 알겠다. 너희가 그렇게까지 말하는데 무시할 순 없지. 수영을 배우겠다.

Vargr1ED_5.english: Damn it... Fine. Stop whining and hand over the dishcloth. Anyone watching would think you worked your ass off.
Vargr1ED_5.korean:
아이씨… 알았어. 그만 찡얼거리고 행주 내놔.
누가 보면 존나 열심히 일한 줄 알겠네.

Vargr1ED_50.english: Well then, I'm done with my work, so I'll leave first.
Vargr1ED_50.korean: 그럼, 내 일은 다 끝났으니 먼저 퇴근하겠다.

Vargr1ED_51.english: Um... Vargr, you seem quite upset... Wouldn't it be better to apologize?
Vargr1ED_51.korean: 저어… 바르그 씨, 기분이 많이 상하신 것 같은데… 사과하시는 게 좋지 않을까요?

Vargr1ED_52.english: Okay~ Don't worry, even after all that, he'll be grinning again in the evening while looking at hot pack photo books.
Vargr1ED_52.korean: 됐어~ 저러고도 저녁에는 또 핫팩 화보집이나 보면서 헤실거리니까 걱정하지 마.

Vargr1ED_53.english: And honestly, it's not like we said anything terrible to that mutt. Who knows? Maybe thanks to us, he'll grit his teeth and learn how to swim properly.
Vargr1ED_53.korean:
그리고 솔직히 우리가 똥개한테 못 할 말을 한 것도 아니잖아.
혹시 알아? 우리 덕분에 이 악물고 수영을 제대로 배워올지.

Vargr1ED_54.english: Come to think of it, even though I've seen Vargr at Aqua Land occasionally, I've never seen him wearing a swimsuit and playing in the water...
Vargr1ED_54.korean:
생각해 보니, 아쿠아 랜드에서 바르그 씨를 간혹 봤어도
수영복을 입고 물에 들어가서 노는 모습을 본 적이 없네요…

Vargr1ED_55.english: Even though you don't show it, I feel like you'd like to play in the water together...
Vargr1ED_55.korean: 내색은 안 하셔도, 물에서 같이 놀고 싶으실 것 같은데…

Vargr1ED_56.english: I mean. If you want to go into the water, you have to learn it yourself. Otherwise, you'll never be able to go in for the rest of your life.
Vargr1ED_56.korean: 그러니까. 물에 들어가고 싶으면 직접 배워야지. 아니면 평생 못 들어가는 거고.

Vargr1ED_57.english: Oh~ Hey, is this little rascal worrying about our boss? Huh? Since when did you become such a loyal subordinate?
Vargr1ED_57.korean: 오~ 야, 똥강아지가 우리 대장이라고 걱정해 주는 거야? 응? 언제부터 그렇게 충실한 부하가 되셨어?

Vargr1ED_58.english: Z-bullshit! Why would I worry about that dog? Shut your mouth and wipe the table.
Vargr1ED_58.korean: 지, 지랄! 내가 왜 저 똥개를 걱정하냐? 입 닥치고 테이블이나 닦아.

Vargr1ED_59.english: Vargr, can you come here for a moment?

Vargr1ED_6.english: It's so ridiculous... Every time I see them slacking off like that and still getting the tuna cans, I want to flick them on the forehead.
Vargr1ED_6.korean: 어이가 없어서… 저렇게 농땡이 부리고도 똑같이 참치캔 타가는 거 볼 때마다 이마에 딱밤 때리고 싶네.

Vargr1ED_62.english: How is it? The bikini swimsuit on the mannequin is pretty, isn't it? As soon as I saw it, I thought of Vargr. I think it would suit him well. Shall I buy it for him?
Vargr1ED_62.korean: 어때? 마네킹이 입은 비키니 수영복, 예쁘지? 보자마자 바르그가 떠올랐어. 잘 어울릴 것 같은데, 사줄까?

Vargr1ED_63.english: Master, thank you for the offer, but... I do not float on water.
Vargr1ED_63.korean: 주인님, 말씀은 감사하지만… 저는 물에 뜨지 않습니다.

Vargr1ED_64.english: … Of course, Master, if you want to see me in that bikini, I will gladly wear it.
Vargr1ED_64.korean: …무, 물론 주인님께서 제가 저 비키니를 입은 모습을 보고 싶으시다면, 기꺼이 입겠습니다.

Vargr1ED_65.english: Wouldn't a bikini look prettier if worn at the pool... Haha... It feels a bit a bit strange to wear it just to show it to me...
Vargr1ED_65.korean:
비키니는 풀장에서 입어야 더 예쁘지 않을까… 하하…
나한테만 보여주려고 입는 건 좀 그렇지…

Vargr1ED_67.english: Come to think of it, remember when I first went to Aqua Land with Vargr? I remember him snapping back at me when I suggested he try swimming...
Vargr1ED_67.korean:
그러고 보니, 바르그랑 처음에 아쿠아 랜드에 갔을 때 말이야.
수영해 보라고 권하니까 틱틱 쏘아붙였던 게 생각나네…

Vargr1ED_68.english: By any chance, Vargr hates swimming... Did I say something unnecessary?
Vargr1ED_68.korean: 혹시 바르그는 수영을 싫어하는데… 내가 괜한 말을 한 건가?

Vargr1ED_7.english: Ugh... I'm sick and tired of my part-time job now. I'm going to take a vacation soon and go to Aqua Land with Hot Pack to have a blast.
Vargr1ED_7.korean: 에휴… 이젠 알바도 지겹다, 지겨워. 조만간 휴가 내고 핫팩이랑 아쿠아 랜드에 가서 찐~ 하게 놀다 와야지.

Vargr1ED_70.english: However... the thing is... well... I mean... I'm not good at swimming...
Vargr1ED_70.korean: 다만… 그게… 그러니까… 제가 수영을 모, 못해서…

Vargr1ED_71.english: Ah, so that's how it was? Hmm... If you happen to want to learn how to swim, why don't you ask the other members to teach you?
Vargr1ED_71.korean:
아, 그런 거였어? 흠… 혹시 수영을 배우고 싶으면,
다른 대원들한테 가르쳐 달라고 해보는 건 어때?

Vargr1ED_72.english: Since Dione, Serpent, and Leanne are all good at swimming.
Vargr1ED_72.korean: 디오네랑 서펀트, 리앤 모두 수영엔 일가견이 있으니까.

Vargr1ED_73.english: … I’m not sure if I’ll be able to swim even if I learn…
Vargr1ED_73.korean: …제가 배운다고 수영을 할 수 있을지는… 모르겠습니다.

Vargr1ED_74.english: The way I see it, just like back at the cafe, it seems like Vargr would be good at anything if he just learned it.
Vargr1ED_74.korean: 내가 보기에는 카페 때도 그랬지만, 바르그는 배우기만 하면 뭐든 잘할 것 같은데?

Vargr1ED_75.english: I like the dignified Vargr, but… I also want to see Vargr wearing a swimsuit and splashing around in the water.
Vargr1ED_75.korean: 난 근엄한 바르그도 좋지만… 수영복을 입고 물장구치면서 노는 바르그의 모습도 보고 싶어.

Vargr1ED_76.english: … I will take that into consideration, Master.

Vargr1ED_78.english: It feels unfamiliar, as expected... My master said it suited me, so I bought it on impulse.
Vargr1ED_78.korean: 역시 낯설어… 주인님께서 어울린다고 하셔서… 충동적으로 사버렸다.

Vargr1ED_79.english: However, now that I have bought this bikini... I can't just let it go to waste because I can't swim.
Vargr1ED_79.korean: 하지만, 이 비키니를 산 이상… 수영을 못 한다는 이유로 썩혀둘 수는 없다.

Vargr1ED_8.english: The commander looked like a total busy man... do you think he'd have time for a date with you?
Vargr1ED_8.korean: 사령관 존나 바빠 보이던데… 너랑 데이트 할 시간이 있겠냐?

Vargr1ED_80.english: Thank you all for gathering here. You need to practice whenever you have the chance so that you can respond calmly even in emergency situations.
Vargr1ED_80.korean: 다들 이렇게 모여줘서 고마워. 평소에 틈틈이 연습해 둬야, 비상 상황에서도 침착하게 대응할 수 있을 거야.

Vargr1ED_81.english: Hehe, I'm the worst swimmer out of the three of us, so of course I have to work hard.
Vargr1ED_81.korean: 후후, 우리 셋 중에서 내가 제일 수영을 못 하는데, 당연히 열심히 해야지.

Vargr1ED_82.english: Thank you so much, Leanne. It was overwhelming for just the two of us to manage Aqua Land with Serpent.
Vargr1ED_82.korean: 정말 고마워요, 리앤 씨. 서펀트 씨와 둘이서만 아쿠아 랜드를 관리하기에는 버거웠거든요.

Vargr1ED_83.english: I look forward to your continued support.

Vargr1ED_84.english: Alright then, shall we get started? First, before getting in the water…
Vargr1ED_84.korean: 자~ 그럼 시작해 볼까? 우선 물에 들어가기 전…

Vargr1ED_86.english: I'm sorry if I disturbed you during practice, but... would it be alright if I asked you a favor?
Vargr1ED_86.korean: 혹시 연습 중에 방해가 되었다면 미안하지만… 부탁 좀 해도 괜찮겠나?

Vargr1ED_88.english: Oh my god… Vargr! What’s with that swimsuit?

Vargr1ED_89.english: … Huh? Why is everyone surprised by Vargr's appearance?
Vargr1ED_89.korean: …응? 왜 다들 바르그 씨의 모습에 놀라시죠?

Vargr1ED_9.english: My one and only girlfriend is asking me to make some time for her, so how could I refuse? And you know what? I even bought a sexy swimsuit to wear at Aqua Land, you know?
Vargr1ED_9.korean:
하나뿐인 여친이 시간 좀 내달라는데, 거절할 수 있겠어?
그리고 나 말이야, 아쿠아 랜드에서 입을 섹시한 수영복도 샀거든?

Vargr1ED_90.english: Ah, Dione hasn't been with us for long, so she doesn't know.
Vargr1ED_90.korean: 아, 디오네는 합류한 지 오래되지 않아서 모르는구나.

Vargr1ED_91.english: There may be many members who dislike water, but there aren't any who dislike playing at Aqua Land, right?
Vargr1ED_91.korean: 물을 싫어하는 대원은 많아도, 아쿠아 랜드에서 노는 걸 싫어하는 대원들은 없잖아?

Vargr1ED_92.english: That's right. Especially if the Commander shows up at Aqua Land, that day is just like the marketplace.
Vargr1ED_92.korean: 그렇지. 특히나 사령관이 아쿠아 랜드에 등장하기라도 하면 그날은 진짜 시장 바닥 같다니까.

Vargr1ED_93.english: … But even after hearing that news, there is one member who is the only one we cannot see, and that is Vargr, who is standing right in front of us!
Vargr1ED_93.korean: …하지만 그 소식을 들어도 유일하게 안 보이는 대원이 있는데, 그게 바로 우리 앞에 서 있는 바르그야!

Vargr1ED_95.english: Ah… I see. Oh! Then,Vargr is wearing a swimsuit today…?
Vargr1ED_95.korean: 아… 그렇군요. 앗! 그럼 오늘 바르그 씨가 수영복을 입은 건…?

Vargr1ED_96.english: Based on my deduction, there is only one answer!

Vargr1ED_97.english: Vargr, you... Didn't you come here to ask us to teach you how to swim?
Vargr1ED_97.korean: 바르그 너… 우리한테 수영을 가르쳐달라고 온 거 아냐?

Vargr1ED_98.english: … You understand quickly, so I won't say much.

Vargr1ED_99.english: I want to learn to swim properly... could you teach me?
Vargr1ED_99.korean: 수영을 정식으로 배우려는데… 가르쳐 줄 수 있겠나?

Vargr2ED_1.english: There is no reason why we shouldn't teach you how to swim. No! On the contrary, it is a good mindset.
Vargr2ED_1.korean: 우리가 수영을 가르쳐주지 않을 이유는 없지. 아니! 오히려 좋은 마음가짐이야.

Vargr2ED_10.english: Vargr, now get off the tube.

Vargr2ED_100.english: Just like Watson, who accepted you without giving up on you.
Vargr2ED_100.korean: 널 포기하지 않고 받아준 왓슨처럼 말이야.

Vargr2ED_101.english: … Yes, Master tried to make me surrender even after knowing my true identity as a Delta spy.
Vargr2ED_101.korean: …그래, 주인님은 델타의 스파이였던 내 정체를 알고도 투항시키려고 노력하셨다.

Vargr2ED_102.english: … I can’t just give up and back down over something as trivial as swimming!
Vargr2ED_102.korean: …겨우 수영 따위에 꼬리를 내리고 포기할 수야 없지!

Vargr2ED_103.english: That's it! That's exactly it, Vargr!

Vargr2ED_104.english: Alright, I ask for your guidance once again, Superintendent!
Vargr2ED_104.korean: 좋아, 다시 한번 가르침을 부탁한다, 총경!

Vargr2ED_12.english: It's okay, it's okay. If it looks like you're going to fall in, I'll hand you a rescue tube right away.
Vargr2ED_12.korean: 괜찮아, 괜찮아. 네가 빠질 것 같으면 레스큐 튜브를 바로 건네줄게.

Vargr2ED_13.english: Can your tube… support my weight?
Vargr2ED_13.korean: 네 튜브는… 내 몸무게를 버틸 수 있나?

Vargr2ED_14.english: Hey, don't worry. This tube floats just fine, even when tucked under Straw Satgat's armpit, you know?
Vargr2ED_14.korean: 에이, 걱정 마. 이 튜브는 삿갓 씨의 겨드랑이에 껴도 잘만 떠오르는걸?

Vargr2ED_15.english: … Did Satgat ever wear that tube?

Vargr2ED_16.english: She came to learn how to swim, saying he would become a man worthy of Hugin and Munin. … She gave up, though, because he couldn't reach the speed of the battleship's propulsion.
Vargr2ED_16.korean:
후긴이랑 무닌에 어울리는 남자가 되겠다면서 수영을 배우려고 왔었지.
…전함의 추진력만큼 속도를 내지 못해서 포기했지만.

Vargr2ED_17.english: … Isn't the mindset of trying to swim as fast as a boat strange?
Vargr2ED_17.korean: …배와 맞먹을 정도로 빠르게 수영하겠다는 사고방식이 이상하지 않나?

Vargr2ED_18.english: Anyway, Vargr, it's fine, so get off the tube! You absolutely won't sink.
Vargr2ED_18.korean: 하여튼 바르그, 괜찮으니까 튜브에서 내려와! 절대 가라앉을 일은 없으니까.

Vargr2ED_2.english: So you want to show Watson what you look like in a swimsuit, and while you're at it, show off your skills, right?
Vargr2ED_2.korean: 왓슨한테 수영복 입은 모습도 보여주고, 겸사겸사 실력까지 뽐내고 싶다는 거잖아?

Vargr2ED_20.english: Pfft... Ughhhhh!! I, I'm sinking! Give me the rescue tube right now! Hurry!
Vargr2ED_20.korean: 푸핫… 우하아아아앗!! 가, 가라앉는다! 어서 레스큐 튜브를 줘라! 어서!

Vargr2ED_22.english: Phew, I almost sank... The water is too deep for me...
Vargr2ED_22.korean: 후아, 가라앉을 뻔했군… 내게는 너무 깊은 물이다…

Vargr2ED_23.english: Ugh... Aaaah!! I slipped!! I can't keep my balance...!!
Vargr2ED_23.korean: 으… 으아아아!! 미끄러졌다!! 중심을 잡을 수가…!!

Vargr2ED_25.english: *Gasp*... *Gasp*... As expected, swimming is... too much for me...
Vargr2ED_25.korean: 허억… 허억… 역시 수영은… 나한테 무리…

Vargr2ED_26.english: Hey, Vargr. I'm really sorry to say this, but...

Vargr2ED_27.english: It’s deep water for LRL or Andvari... but Vargr, isn’t it deep enough for someone like you to stand in?
Vargr2ED_27.korean: LRL이나 안드바리한테 깊은 물이긴 한데… 바르그, 너 정도면 충분히 서 있을 만한 수심 아냐?

Vargr2ED_28.english: Of course, it is right for beginners to stay in shallow water for safety... but it is a bit awkward if they are flailing around even at a depth of 1.3 meters.
Vargr2ED_28.korean: 물론 초심자는 안전상 얕은 물 속에 있는 게 맞지만… 수심 1.3m에서도 허우적거리면 좀 난감한데.

Vargr2ED_3.english: … Lately, most of the members have forgotten the original purpose of swimsuits.
Vargr2ED_3.korean: …요즘 들어 대부분의 대원이 수영복의 본래 용도를 잊고 있어.

Vargr2ED_31.english: Right? Ahaha... Then, shall we start by lightly floating on the water?
Vargr2ED_31.korean: 그렇지? 아하하… 그러면 가볍게 물 위에 뜨는 것부터 시작해 볼까?

Vargr2ED_32.english: Now, lie down looking at the sky and relax your body. Just like humans, bioroids have basic buoyancy.
Vargr2ED_32.korean: 자, 하늘을 보고 누워서 몸에 힘을 빼봐. 인간처럼 바이오로이드도 기본적인 부력을 가지고 있어.

Vargr2ED_33.english: Really? I have never once floated in water…
Vargr2ED_33.korean: 정말인가? 난 단 한 번도 물에 뜬 적이 없었다…

Vargr2ED_34.english: Hey, just trust me, Vargr. I'm telling you, it'll be fine.

Vargr2ED_36.english: Vargr… It’s shallower than you, so there’s no reason for you to fall in.
Vargr2ED_36.korean: 바르그… 네 키보다 수심이 낮은 곳인데, 물에 빠질 이유가 없잖아.

Vargr2ED_37.english: Now, quickly let go of the rescue tube and fully relax.
Vargr2ED_37.korean: 자, 얼른 레스큐 튜브에서 팔 떼고 힘을 쭉 빼 봐.

Vargr2ED_41.english: …Did it really sink?! Why do I sink even in shallow water?! Vargr, wait a minute!
Vargr2ED_41.korean: …정말 가라앉았어?! 어째서 얕은 물에서도 빠지는 거냐고! 바르그 잠깐만 기다려!

Vargr2ED_43.english: … I didn't know it would be a real beer bottle.

Vargr2ED_44.english: A back-worn helper, a kickboard for practicing kicks... and even an armband.
Vargr2ED_44.korean: 등에 착용하는 헬퍼랑, 발차기 연습용 킥판… 거기에다 암밴드까지.

Vargr2ED_45.english: Oh! So it actually floats now.

Vargr2ED_46.english: Let's learn step by step. It won't sink easily anymore.
Vargr2ED_46.korean: 좀 더 차근히 배워보도록 하죠. 이제 어지간해서 가라앉을 일은 없을 거예요.

Vargr2ED_47.english: Maybe Vargr can't rise because he has more muscle than us.
Vargr2ED_47.korean: 어쩌면 바르그는 우리랑 다르게 근육이 많아서 못 뜨는 걸지도 몰라.

Vargr2ED_48.english: Is that so? But Janghwa and CheonA were dropping just fine... That's strange.
Vargr2ED_48.korean: 그런가? 하지만 장화랑 천아는 잘만 뜨던데… 이상하군.

Vargr2ED_5.english: Come to think of it, I recently saw some members going to Aqua Land... and their swimsuit materials were things like jewels, ropes... feathers... or seashells.
Vargr2ED_5.korean:
그러고 보니 최근에 아쿠아 랜드에 가는 대원분들을 봤었는데… 
수영복 재료가 보석이나 밧줄… 깃털… 혹은 조개껍질 같은 것들이더라고요.

Vargr2ED_50.english: Could buoyancy possibly vary depending on breast size?
Vargr2ED_50.korean: 혹시 가슴이 크기에 따라 부력이 달라질 수도 있나?

Vargr2ED_52.english: … Aren't you guys swimming effortlessly right now even without tubes? Isn't your chest acting as the tube?
Vargr2ED_52.korean: …지금 너희들은 튜브가 없어도 여유롭게 수영하지 않나? 가슴이 튜브 역할을 하는 게 아닌가?

Vargr2ED_53.english: No, that's a bit strange. Fafnir with breasts like yours sinks easily in water...
Vargr2ED_53.korean: 아니, 그건 조금 이상하군. 너희만 한 가슴을 가진 파프니르는 물에 잘 가라앉는데…

Vargr2ED_54.english: My chest isn't an air sack, Vargr!
Vargr2ED_54.korean: 제 가슴은 공기주머니가 아니에요, 바르그 씨!

Vargr2ED_55.english: Right. That's not it... Actually, when swimming, having a big chest makes it uncomfortable to move your arms.
Vargr2ED_55.korean: 맞아. 그건 아니야… 오히려 수영할 때는 가슴이 크면 팔을 젓는 게 불편해.

Vargr2ED_57.english: Excuse me. I just said it because I was so frustrated...

Vargr2ED_58.english: Haa... Please stop with the strange things, Vargr. Well then, shall we start with the basic kicks?
Vargr2ED_58.korean: 하아… 이상한 말씀은 그만하시고, 바르그 씨. 그럼, 기본적인 킥부터 시작해 볼까요?

Vargr2ED_6.english: That's right... at some point, the roles were reversed...

Vargr2ED_61.english: Vargr. If you flail your arms around haphazardly, you'll expend a lot of energy. Now, look at me. Alternate your arms regularly like this... like this.
Vargr2ED_61.korean:
바르그. 아무렇게나 팔을 허우적거리면 체력 소모가 커진다고.
자, 날 봐봐. 이렇게 규칙적으로 팔을 번갈아서… 이렇게.

Vargr2ED_64.english: No, I mean… extend your arms regularly, like this!
Vargr2ED_64.korean: 아니, 내 말은… 규칙적으로 팔을 뻗어서, 이렇게!

Vargr2ED_66.english: …Vargr. Do you happen to know what rhythm is?

Vargr2ED_68.english: I guess it can't be helped. Then, since I'll check your posture every time you blow the whistle, let's start by practicing the arm movements slowly.
Vargr2ED_68.korean:
하는 수 없네요. 그러면 서펀트 씨가 휘슬을 불 때마다
제가 옆에서 자세를 봐드릴 테니까, 팔동작부터 천천히 연습해 보자고요.

Vargr2ED_69.english: Now, left hand... right hand! Left hand again...That's not it! Vargr... stop flailing around haphazardly...
Vargr2ED_69.korean: 자, 왼손… 오른손! 다시 왼손… 그게 아니에요! 바르그 씨… 마구잡이로 허우적대지 마시고요…

Vargr2ED_7.english: … Of course, the main purpose is to show it to the master.
Vargr2ED_7.korean: …무, 물론, 주인님께 보여드리기 위한 목적이 크다.

Vargr2ED_71.english: Oh my god, I've never seen anyone struggle like that... no, I mean, terribly...
Vargr2ED_71.korean: 세상에, 저렇게 끔… 아니, 지독할 정도로 버둥거리는 건 처음 봐…

Vargr2ED_72.english: Even if the sound of the water is loud, I can hear everything. Superintendent.

Vargr2ED_74.english: … But it’s true, so I have nothing to say in rebuttal.

Vargr2ED_75.english: Oh, still, it seems like you've improved compared to the beginning. Vargr! It looks like your stamina has dropped, so let's take a break.
Vargr2ED_75.korean:
오, 그래도 처음보다는 나아진 것 같아.
바르그! 체력도 떨어진 것 같은데, 조금 쉬면서 하자고.

Vargr2ED_78.english: Vargr. Here, take it easy while drinking this.

Vargr2ED_8.english: However, I do not want to use this outfit solely to satisfy my master's sight.
Vargr2ED_8.korean: 그렇지만 이 옷을 단지 주인님의 시각을 만족시키기 위한 용도로만 쓰고 싶지 않다.

Vargr2ED_81.english: … I have a question. Superintendent. Are there any other members besides me who do not enter the pools at Aqua Land?
Vargr2ED_81.korean: …질문이 있다. 총경. 나 외에도 아쿠아 랜드의 풀장에 들어가지 않는 대원이 있나?

Vargr2ED_82.english: Hmm... Perona Poi acts like she hates water, but whenever Watson goes for a swim, she immediately follows him in.
Vargr2ED_82.korean: 글쎄… 페로나 포이는 물을 싫어하는 것 같아도, 왓슨이 수영할 때면 곧장 따라 들어가던데?

Vargr2ED_84.english: So at first, seeing you in a swimsuit felt a little strange.
Vargr2ED_84.korean: 그래서 처음에 네가 수영복을 입고 온 모습이 조금 낯설었어.

Vargr2ED_85.english: Cheer up! If you study hard, Vargr will be able to swim wonderfully too.
Vargr2ED_85.korean: 기운내! 열심히 배우면, 바르그도 멋지게 헤엄칠 수 있을 거야.

Vargr2ED_86.english: … I bought this bikini because my master told me it would suit me.
Vargr2ED_86.korean: …이 비키니는 주인님께서 나에게 어울릴 거라고 말씀해 주셔서 산 거다.

Vargr2ED_87.english: But, as expected, a swimsuit looks better when worn for swimming.
Vargr2ED_87.korean: 하지만 수영복은 역시, 수영할 때 입어야 더 어울리겠지.

Vargr2ED_88.english: Right, that's really good advice for the Orca members to take to heart... You're not thinking of joining the City Guard's morals enforcement squad, are you... Ahaha... No.
Vargr2ED_88.korean:
맞아, 오르카 대원들이 새겨들으면 참 좋은 말인데 말이야… 
혹시 시티 가드의 풍기 단속반에 들어올 생각은 없… 아하하… 아냐.

Vargr2ED_89.english: Vargr, I'm sorry for teasing you earlier. If you try just a little harder, you can definitely do it too.
Vargr2ED_89.korean: 바르그, 아까 놀린 건 미안해. 조금만 더 노력하면 너도 분명히 할 수 있을 거야.

Vargr2ED_9.english: Oh, that's a good thing! Alright, then let's get started right away!
Vargr2ED_9.korean: 오~ 기특한 말을 하는데? 좋아, 그럼 당장 시작하자!

Vargr2ED_90.english: … I don’t know when I’ll be able to swim without drinking too much water, but… thank you for your support.
Vargr2ED_90.korean: …언제쯤 물을 덜 먹고 헤엄칠 수 있을지는 모르겠지만… 응원 고맙다.

Vargr2ED_91.english: Do you know, Vargr? You have wolf genes. Did you know that wolves are surprisingly good swimmers?
Vargr2ED_91.korean:
그거 알아, 바르그? 너한테는 늑대 유전자가 있잖아.
늑대는 의외로 수영 실력이 엄청 좋다는 거 알고 있어?

Vargr2ED_92.english: I know that, but... my skeletal structure or weight...
Vargr2ED_92.korean: 그건 알고 있지만… 내 골격이나, 체중은…

Vargr2ED_93.english: They say even the Invincible Dragon is an incredible swimmer. You, with the genes of both the wolf and the Invincible Dragon, there's really no way you can't swim, right?
Vargr2ED_93.korean:
무적의 용도 수영을 엄청나게 잘한다고 하더라.
늑대랑 무적의 용의 유전자를 다 가진 네가, 정말로 수영을 못할 리가 없잖아?

Vargr2ED_95.english: You're prepared to show off your swimming skills to Watson in that bikini... so why did you assume from the start that you can't swim?
Vargr2ED_95.korean: 그 비키니를 입고 왓슨한테 수영 실력을 뽐낼 각오는 있으면서… 왜 애초부터 수영을 못 할 거라 단정해?

Vargr2ED_96.english: As I keep falling into the water… my confidence is disappearing.
Vargr2ED_96.korean: 계속해서 물에 빠지다 보니… 자신감이 사라진다.

Vargr2ED_97.english: I suppose so. But I like seeing you not give up.
Vargr2ED_97.korean: 그렇겠지. 하지만 나는 네가 포기하지 않는 모습이 좋아.

Vargr2ED_98.english: Rather than giving it a try and easily giving up... wouldn't it be better to keep trying until it works?
Vargr2ED_98.korean: 찔끔해보다 쉽게 포기하는 것보단… 될 때까지 해보는 게 맞지 않을까?

Vargr3ED_1.english: One, two… One, two! Stretch your arms further, Vargr!
Vargr3ED_1.korean: 하나, 둘… 하나, 둘! 팔을 더 멀리 뻗어, 바르그!

Vargr3ED_10.english: … You didn't say we'd swim together.

Vargr3ED_101.english: Phew... Phew... Was this the crawl stroke?! Or the butterfly?!
Vargr3ED_101.korean: 후아… 후… 파, 이게 크롤 수영법이었나?! 아니면 접영?!

Vargr3ED_102.english: Congratulations, Vargr…! You’ve finally mastered swimming!
Vargr3ED_102.korean: 축하해요, 바르그 씨…! 드디어 수영을 터득하셨군요!

Vargr3ED_103.english: It was far removed from formal swimming techniques, but...

Vargr3ED_104.english: That swimming style definitely… had a name, right?
Vargr3ED_104.korean: 저 수영법을 분명… 부르는 이름이 있었지, 아마?

Vargr3ED_105.english: Yeah... it's called the so-called doggy paddle.

Vargr3ED_11.english: A few days ago, the Magical Gentleman told me.
Vargr3ED_11.korean: 요 며칠 전, 매지컬 젠틀맨이 알려줬습니다.

Vargr3ED_12.english: Finding a shared hobby with your boss is the very virtue of a loyal subordinate!
Vargr3ED_12.korean: 직장 상사와 공통된 취미를 만드는 것이야말로 충직한 부하의 덕목이라고!

Vargr3ED_13.english: I asked Azaz to do the rust prevention work, so you don't need to worry about my body, Great Demon King!
Vargr3ED_13.korean:
아자즈에게 부탁해서 녹슬음 방지 작업을 해놨으니, 
제 소체는 걱정하지 않으셔도 괜찮습니다, 대마왕님!

Vargr3ED_14.english: No... I'm telling you, it's fine if I do it alone...

Vargr3ED_15.english: Come to think of it, why is there a swimming pool deep enough for Goltarion XIII to swim in...?
Vargr3ED_15.korean: 그러고 보니 골타리온이 헤엄칠 수 있을 정도로 깊은 수영장이 왜 있어요…?

Vargr3ED_16.english: Well... since there was talk that the AGS wanted to enjoy swimming like the Bioroids, Azaz temporarily modified a diving pool to create an AGS practice pool.
Vargr3ED_16.korean:
글쎄… AGS들도 바이오로이드들처럼 수영을 즐기고 싶단 얘기가 나와서, 
아자즈가 임시로 다이빙 풀을 개조해서 AGS 연습 풀을 만들었더라고.

Vargr3ED_17.english: It is a bit of a flaw that it was designed to be deep considering the size of the AGSs... but I never imagined Goltarion XIII would be this good at swimming.
Vargr3ED_17.korean:
AGS들의 크기를 고려해서 조금 깊게 설계된 게 흠이긴 한데…
설마 골타리온이 이렇게 수영을 잘할 줄은 몰랐는걸?

Vargr3ED_18.english: Hahaha! For the Great Demon King's henchman, swimming is practically a basic requirement...!
Vargr3ED_18.korean: 크하하하! 대마왕님의 심복이라면 수영 정도는 기본 소양이나 다름없지…!

Vargr3ED_19.english: If I ever have to face off against the magical girls again in the future, I will have the Demon Lord's soldiers practice combat swimming and secure victory without fail!
Vargr3ED_19.korean:
후일 다시 마법소녀들과 결전을 치를 일이 생긴다면
마왕군의 병사들에게 전투 수영을 시켜서, 반드시 승리를 쟁취하겠다!

Vargr3ED_2.english: Hah... Hah... Haa... This is taking more effort than I thought...
Vargr3ED_2.korean: 허억… 허억… 하아… 생각보다 힘이 많이 드는군…

Vargr3ED_20.english: Excuse me, I'm not trying to pick a fight, but... Goltarion XIII... wouldn't it cost quite a bit to apply rust prevention treatment to the AGS soldiers under our command...?
Vargr3ED_20.korean:
저기, 태클 걸려는 건 아닌데요. 골타리온… 저희 휘하의 AGS 병사들에게
녹슬음 방지 작업을 하면 비용이 꽤 많이 들지 않을까요…?

Vargr3ED_21.english: As expected of the Supreme Great Demon King! Humble Goltarion XIII… I hadn't even considered that part. In that case, I will make swimming a mandatory subject only for the Bioroids enlisting in the Demon King's army!
Vargr3ED_21.korean:
역시 지고의 대마왕님! 미천한 골타리온 XIII세… 그 부분은 미처 생각하지도 못했습니다.
그렇다면 마왕군에 입대할 바이오로이드들에게만 수영을 필수 과목으로 지정하겠습니다!

Vargr3ED_22.english: Oh, right. Hey guys, aren't you interested in being commissioned as special instructors for the Demon Lord's Army? For your information, our Demon Lord's Army is scheduled to provide various benefits, including a four-day workweek, quarterly performance bonuses, free use of annual leave on the same day, and meal tickets for the Sowan Cafeteria.
Vargr3ED_22.korean:
아, 참. 이보게 자네들, 마왕군의 특수 교관으로 임관할 생각은 없나?
참고로 우리 마왕군은 주 4일 근무와 분기별 성과급 지급, 당일 연차 자유 사용, 그리고 소완 카페테리아 식권 지급 등 여러 복지 혜택이 제공될 예정이다.

Vargr3ED_23.english: Haha… That’s fine… But Goltarion XIII, you look quite heavy, yet your swimming form is flawlessly perfect…?
Vargr3ED_23.korean: 하하… 그건 괜찮아요… 그런데 골타리온 씨는 소체가 무거워 보이시는데, 수영 자세가 빈틈없이 완벽하시네요…?

Vargr3ED_24.english: A loyal follower serves their lord by overcoming any obstacle. Now that I have mastered the crawl, teach me the backstroke immediately!
Vargr3ED_24.korean:
심복이란 그 어떤 난관도 헤쳐나가며 주군을 모시는 법이다.
이제 크롤 수영법은 숙달했으니, 얼른 배영을 가르쳐다오!

Vargr3ED_25.english: … Ahaha. You’re very enthusiastic. Then, can I coach Faucre and Dione take care of Goltarion XII ?
Vargr3ED_25.korean:
…아하하. 열의가 대단하네. 그럼 뽀끄루는 내가 코칭해주고
골타리온은 디오네가 해줄 수 있겠어?

Vargr3ED_26.english: Yes, I understand! The water where Goltarion XIII is swimming is quite deep, so I'll take care of it.
Vargr3ED_26.korean: 네, 알겠어요! 골타리온 씨가 헤엄치는 곳은 수심이 상당히 깊으니까, 제가 맡을게요.

Vargr3ED_27.english: Great Demon King! With an even healthier body, you are returning to the Great Demon King of the days when you fought against Magical Momo and Baekto!
Vargr3ED_27.korean: 대마왕님! 더욱 건강해진 옥체로, 매지컬 모모와 백토를 대적하시던 시절의 대마왕님으로 돌아가시는 겁니다!

Vargr3ED_28.english: Haa... Okay, let's finish this quickly...

Vargr3ED_29.english: It feels a bit excessive, though...

Vargr3ED_3.english: Swimming is actually an exercise that burns a tremendous amount of calories. You know how hard Leanne struggled when she first learned to swim?
Vargr3ED_3.korean:
원래 수영은 칼로리 소모가 엄청난 운동이야.
리앤도 수영을 처음 배웠을 땐 얼마나 힘들어했는데?

Vargr3ED_30.english: … Goltarion XIII’s loyalty is truly admirable.

Vargr3ED_31.english: Look at that. Even Goltarian XIII swims that well, so there's no reason why you can't swim, right?
Vargr3ED_31.korean: 저 봐. 골타리온도 저렇게 수영을 잘하는데, 네가 수영을 못할 이유는 없잖아?

Vargr3ED_33.english: Your feelings for the Commander are just as strong as Goltarion XIII's feelings for Faucre, aren't they?
Vargr3ED_33.korean: 너도 사령관에 대한 마음, 골타리온이 뽀끄루한테 가진 감정에 뒤지지 않잖아?

Vargr3ED_34.english: Show the commander that you can swim confidently!
Vargr3ED_34.korean: 당당하게 사령관 앞에서 헤엄치는 모습을 보여주라고!

Vargr3ED_35.english: Okay, that’s it. Shall we take off the braces and try swimming?
Vargr3ED_35.korean: 좋아, 이제 됐어. 슬슬 보조 장비를 떼고 수영해 볼까?

Vargr3ED_36.english: "D-dry it? But... without this equipment... it will sink!"
Vargr3ED_36.korean: 떼, 뗀다고? 하지만… 이 장비들이 없으면… 물에 가라앉을 거다!

Vargr3ED_37.english: But you can't keep swimming with that equipment on forever.
Vargr3ED_37.korean: 그렇다고 계속해서 그 장비를 차고 수영할 수는 없잖아.

Vargr3ED_38.english: Above all, since you’ve finally gotten to wear a pretty bikini, wouldn’t it be a shame to cover it up with gear?
Vargr3ED_38.korean: 무엇보다 모처럼 예쁜 비키니를 입었는데, 장비로 가려버리면 아쉽지 않겠어?

Vargr3ED_4.english: Phew, phew… But where are the Superintendent and Dione?
Vargr3ED_4.korean: 후우, 후… 그런데 총경과 디오네는 어디 있는 거지?

Vargr3ED_40.english: Alright, Vargr. Show us the results of your practice!
Vargr3ED_40.korean: 자, 바르그. 그동안의 연습 성과를 멋지게 보여줘!

Vargr3ED_43.english: Aaaaaaaah!! N-my feet can't reach! Sinking…
Vargr3ED_43.korean: 으아아아아아!! 바, 발이 닿지 않아! 가라앉는…

Vargr3ED_46.english: … Oh my god. It’s sinking even after all that practice?! Just wait a moment, Vargr! I’ll save you right away!
Vargr3ED_46.korean: …맙소사. 그렇게 연습했는데도 가라앉는다고?! 잠깐만 기다려, 바르그! 얼른 구해줄게!

Vargr3ED_48.english: … From my perspective, the arm movement was definitely correct.

Vargr3ED_49.english: The kicks weren't awkward at all, either...

Vargr3ED_5.english: Ah, those two are teaching other kids today.
Vargr3ED_5.korean: 아, 그 둘은 오늘 다른 애들을 가르치고 있어.

Vargr3ED_50.english: What on earth is the problem that it keeps sinking?

Vargr3ED_52.english: Is there a limit to the bioroid's design? If it keeps sinking no matter what, is it really a matter of body weight...?
Vargr3ED_52.korean:
바이오로이드의 설계에 따라 한계가 있는 건가?
어떻게 해도 가라앉는 거면, 정말 몸무게의 문제인 건지…?

Vargr3ED_53.english: Well, but even Mr. Goltarion XIII, who is much heavier than Vargr, swam straight away.
Vargr3ED_53.korean: 글쎄요, 하지만 바르그 씨보다 훨씬 무거운 골타리온 씨도 곧장 수영하시던데요?

Vargr3ED_56.english: If I still can't do it despite you guys teaching me so hard, it means I haven't practiced enough. I will make it happen no matter what! I don't want to be ridiculed for something as trivial as swimming!
Vargr3ED_56.korean:
너희들이 열심히 가르쳐 주었는데도 못한다면, 내 연습량이 부족한거다.
난 반드시 어떻게든 해낼 거다! 이깟 수영 따위로 비웃음을 사고 싶지 않단 말이다!

Vargr3ED_58.english: Vargr, don't push yourself too hard... We did save you, but it was a really dangerous situation...!
Vargr3ED_58.korean: 바르그, 너무 무리하지 마… 우리가 구해주긴 했지만, 정말 위험한 상황이었어…!

Vargr3ED_59.english: Do you think I, who have crossed the line between life and death under the Empress's command since before the apocalypse, would be afraid of something as trivial as swimming!
Vargr3ED_59.korean: 멸망 전부터 여제님의 명령으로 사선을 넘나들었던 내가, 겨우 수영 따위를 두려워할 것 같나!

Vargr3ED_6.english: Who is it that two people got accepted?

Vargr3ED_60.english: … How frustrating! As the leader of the Hounds, I cannot be the first to back down!
Vargr3ED_60.korean: …분하다, 하운드의 대장인 내가 먼저 꼬리를 내릴 수 없다!

Vargr3ED_61.english: get your mindset, but why don't you take a rest first? Loosen up those tight muscles, too. They say muscle cramps are the most dangerous thing in the water...
Vargr3ED_61.korean:
마음가짐은 알겠는데, 일단 좀 쉬는 게 어때? 뭉친 근육도 풀고 말이야.
물속에서 제일 위험한 상황이 근육 경련이라고…

Vargr3ED_62.english: … I know my body well. Don't worry!
Vargr3ED_62.korean: …내 몸은 내가 잘 안다. 걱정하지 마라!

Vargr3ED_63.english: Uh, uh... Vargr... Haven't you been training for over 3 hours?
Vargr3ED_63.korean: 어, 어… 바르그 씨… 지금 3시간 넘게 훈련하지 않으셨나요?

Vargr3ED_64.english: Ha, that idiot... I heard he was old-fashioned and fiercely loyal... but isn't he really going a bit too far?
Vargr3ED_64.korean: 하, 저 바보… 고지식하고 충성심이 강하다는 건 들었지만… 정말 너무 과한 거 아니야?

Vargr3ED_65.english: I think I really need to stop them. I'll go, Vargr! Wait...
Vargr3ED_65.korean: 역시 말려야 할 것 같아. 내가 갈게, 바르그! 기다…

Vargr3ED_67.english: Wait, about the swimming pool Vargr just jumped into… it’s not a swimming pool for child bioroids.
Vargr3ED_67.korean: 잠깐, 지금 바르그가 뛰어든 수영장 말이야… 아동 바이오로이드들 수영장이 아니잖아.

Vargr3ED_68.english: Come to think of it, isn't that the swimming pool exclusively for AGS? It must be at least 10 meters deep... Ah?! Vargr, no bubbles are rising!!
Vargr3ED_68.korean:
그러고 보니 저긴 AGS 전용 수영장 아니에요? 수심이 10m는 될 텐데…
아앗?! 바르그 씨, 기포가 올라오지 않아요!!

Vargr3ED_7.english: One is a bioroid, but the other is a bit of a unique member.
Vargr3ED_7.korean: 한 명은 바이오로이드인데, 다른 한 명은 좀 특이한 대원이야.

Vargr3ED_71.english: (My body… won’t rise… I can’t breathe…)

Vargr3ED_72.english: (Is it the floor...? My arms and legs won't move...)

Vargr3ED_75.english: The grace you have shown in forgiving me for having deceived you, my lord, and in helping me reclaim the remains of Lady Maria Rioboros, is a debt I could never fully repay, even if I dedicated the rest of my life to doing so.
Vargr3ED_75.korean: 지금까지 주인님을 기만했던 저를 용서해 주시고, 나아가 마리아 리오보로스 님의 유해를 되찾게 도와주신 은혜, 제 평생을 다 바쳐 보은하더라도 부족할 것입니다.

Vargr3ED_76.english: Give me the order. I will obey your command, Master, even if it costs me my life.
Vargr3ED_76.korean: 명하십시오. 제 목숨을 바쳐서라도 주인님의 명을 받들겠습니다.

Vargr3ED_79.english: We are now commencing the mission of the recapture team for the Iron Workshop assault operation!
Vargr3ED_79.korean: 지금부터 철의 공방 공략 작전 탈환조 임무를 개시한다!

Vargr3ED_8.english: Hearing that the Great Demon King has gained a lot of weight lately, I, Goltarion XIII, have prepared a special gathering.
Vargr3ED_8.korean: 대마왕님께서 요즘 부쩍 살이 찌셨다는 말씀에, 이 골타리온이 특별한 자리를 마련했습니다.

Vargr3ED_80.english: Tear them apart for your master!

Vargr3ED_85.english: (… for the sake of the foolish squad members who would run wild without a reins without me… and above all, for the sake of my Master who is looking forward to seeing me in a bikini!)
Vargr3ED_85.korean:
(… 내가 없으면 고삐 풀려서 날뛰게 될 바보 같은 부대원들 때문이라도…
무엇보다 비키니를 입은 내 모습을 기대하고 계실 주인님을 위해서라도!)

Vargr3ED_86.english: She's not here! Can you see Ms. Leanne?

Vargr3ED_87.english: Phew... I can't see anything at all. Did it really sink to the bottom?!
Vargr3ED_87.korean: 푸하… 전혀 보이지 않아, 진짜 바닥까지 가라앉은 거야?!

Vargr3ED_88.english: I'll go down with you and look for it too…!

Vargr3ED_9.english: Goltarion XIII, it is true that I said I would lose weight by swimming.
Vargr3ED_9.korean: 골타리온, 제가 수영으로 살을 빼겠다고 이야기했던 건 사실인데요.

Vargr3ED_92.english: Do you think I'll give in so easily?! I haven't even had a pool date with my Master yet! Pfft... Hehe...
Vargr3ED_92.korean:
내가 허무하게 굴복할 것 같나아아아!! 
아직 주인님과 풀장 데이트도 해본 적이 없단 말이다아아아!! 푸흡… 풉…

Vargr3ED_95.english: Good heavens… Are you seeing this right now? Vargr… is swimming?
Vargr3ED_95.korean:
세상에… 저, 지금 제대로 보고 있는 거 맞죠?
바르그 씨가… 헤엄을 치고 있는데요?

Vargr3ED_96.english: … I, I've seen that before. Cerberus swam like that when he was doing maritime rescue training, I think?
Vargr3ED_96.korean: …나, 나 저거 본 적 있어. 켈베로스가 해상 구조 훈련받을 때 저렇게 헤엄쳤었지, 아마?

Vargr3ED_97.english: I saw it too... Even swimming like that, they dragged the mannequin out of the water.
Vargr3ED_97.korean: 나도 봤어… 저렇게 수영해도 마네킹을 물 밖까지 끌고 올라오더라.

Vargr4ED_10.english: I guess some things just can't be done...

Vargr4ED_100.english: I wonder if they'll even listen to me...?

Vargr4ED_101.english: I'll leave a message before I go on vacation. Then, even if both of them get annoyed, they will listen to you.
Vargr4ED_101.korean: 휴가 가기 전에, 내가 말을 남겨 놓도록 하지. 그러면 둘 다 짜증을 내도 네 말을 들을 거다.

Vargr4ED_102.english: Ah, right. Vargr, I see you decided on Aqua Land as your vacation destination.
Vargr4ED_102.korean: 아, 그렇지. 바르그, 너 아쿠아 랜드를 휴가 행선지로 정했더라.

Vargr4ED_103.english: What? You, Vargr?! You're even worse at swimming than me!
Vargr4ED_103.korean: 뭐? 바르그 네가?! 너 나보다도 수영 못하잖아!

Vargr4ED_105.english: It's okay if you can't swim. It's nice to just sit around doing nothing during vacation, isn't it?
Vargr4ED_105.korean: 수영을 못해도 괜찮아. 휴가 땐 아무 생각 없이 앉아만 있어도 좋잖아.

Vargr4ED_106.english: Anyway, that’s good news. I happen to be planning to go to Aqua Land to inspect the facilities, too. Shall we stop by the Empress’s Graveyard together later if we have time, Vargr?
Vargr4ED_106.korean:
그나저나 잘 됐네, 나도 마침 아쿠아 랜드에 시설 점검하러 갈 계획이라서.
나중에 시간이 되면 같이 여제 묘지에 들를까, 바르그?

Vargr4ED_108.english: Alright. Then I'll see you then, Vargr.

Vargr4ED_109.english: As I stroked Vargr's head, her ears kept twitching.
Vargr4ED_109.korean: - 바르그의 머리를 쓰다듬어 주자, 그녀의 귀가 연신 쫑긋거렸다.

Vargr4ED_11.english: It’s not a formal swimming method, but survival comes first in a real situation… wouldn’t it be better to be able to swim, even if it’s an inefficient way?
Vargr4ED_11.korean:
정식 수영법은 아니지만 그래도 실제 상황에선 생존이 우선인데… 
비효율적인 방식이라도 헤엄칠 수 있는 게 낫지 않을까요?

Vargr4ED_12.english: That's right. It's much better than sinking.

Vargr4ED_14.english: … Is my swimming style really that strange?

Vargr4ED_15.english: I'm absolutely not saying it's strange, it's just... how should I put it...
Vargr4ED_15.korean: 이상하다는 건 절대 아냐, 그냥… 뭐랄까…

Vargr4ED_16.english: … It feels like a puppy flailing about?

Vargr4ED_17.english: I'm a wolf! I'm not a puppy!

Vargr4ED_18.english: Um... Fenrir is exactly like that, too. Could it be...

Vargr4ED_19.english: I said don't link me with that exhibitionist wolf!
Vargr4ED_19.korean: 그 노출광 늑대하고 날 엮지 말란 말이다!

Vargr4ED_2.english: Even though it’s not the swimming technique I learned from you guys… it’s really amazing that I can float and swim like this.
Vargr4ED_2.korean:
비록 너희들에게 배운 수영법은 아니지만…
이렇게 물에 떠서 헤엄칠 수 있다니, 정말 신기하군.

Vargr4ED_20.english: Ahaha... Anyway, shall we try practicing again in a way that minimizes wasting energy?
Vargr4ED_20.korean: 아하하… 아무튼 최대한 체력을 낭비하지 않는 방향으로 다시 연습해 볼까요?

Vargr4ED_21.english: Thanks. Now I can perfectly infiltrate underwater without relying on my subordinates.
Vargr4ED_21.korean: 고맙다, 이젠 부하들한테 의지하지 않고도 완벽하게 수중 침투를 할 수 있겠군.

Vargr4ED_22.english: Why are you thankful? It was Vargr who succeeded in the end without giving up.
Vargr4ED_22.korean: 고맙긴 뭘. 결국 포기하지 않고 성공한 건 바르그잖아.

Vargr4ED_24.english: … But it’s a shame that I can’t swim as elegantly as Dione and the Chief Superintendent.
Vargr4ED_24.korean: …하지만 디오네와 총경처럼 우아하게 헤엄칠 수 있는 게 아니라서 아쉽다.

Vargr4ED_25.english: I hate to admit it, but if I were to compare those two to myself…
Vargr4ED_25.korean: 인정하긴 싫지만, 저 둘과 나를 비교한다면…

Vargr4ED_26.english: Isn't it just like a puppy splashing in the water?

Vargr4ED_27.english: Good grief... You used to grumble about not floating.
Vargr4ED_27.korean: 참나… 언제는 물에 뜨지 않는다고 툴툴거리더니.

Vargr4ED_28.english: … My wish was to wear a bikini and swim beautifully like the other members.
Vargr4ED_28.korean: …비키니를 입고 다른 대원들처럼 아름답게 수영하는 게 소원이었다.

Vargr4ED_29.english: Master... probably thinks I'm ridiculous for only doggy paddling...
Vargr4ED_29.korean: 주인님은… 아마, 개헤엄만 치는 나를 우스꽝스러워하시지 않을까…

Vargr4ED_3.english: … Uh, um. Congratulations. But Vargr, aren't you tired? Anyone can tell that move looks incredibly difficult…
Vargr4ED_3.korean:
…어, 음. 축하해요. 근데 바르그 씨. 안 힘드세요?
누가 봐도 엄청 힘들어 보이는 동작 같은데…

Vargr4ED_30.english: Well, do you think the commander will find it amusing to watch you swim?
Vargr4ED_30.korean: 글쎄. 사령관이 과연 네가 수영하는 모습을 보고 우습게 생각할까?

Vargr4ED_32.english: I have known the Commander for a very long time, even before you joined. Up until now, the Commander has never once taken our efforts lightly.
Vargr4ED_32.korean:
네가 합류하기 전부터, 나는 아주 오랫동안 사령관을 봐왔어.
여태까지 사령관은 우리의 노력을 허투루 생각한 적이 단 한 번도 없었지.

Vargr4ED_33.english: If you thought the commander would find you ridiculous, it must be your inferiority complex stemming from your inability to swim.
Vargr4ED_33.korean:
만약에 사령관이 널 우스워할 거라고 생각했다면,
그건 네가 수영을 못 해서 생긴 자격지심이겠지.
